scenarios.prompt: The desired billing behavior is ambiguous. Decide which b-agentic skill should handle clarifying scope before any code changes.
The implementation plan is approved. Make the next small scoped code change and verify it.
Initialize this repository's agent instruction docs with a canonical AGENTS.md and a minimal CLAUDE.md shim.
A failing test exposes a checkout regression in production behavior. Diagnose the runtime root cause.
Fix a component-test mock and assertion; no product behavior is broken.
Use a real browser to verify the requested UI state and capture a screenshot.
Analyze the supplied mockup and create docs/DESIGN.md as reusable frontend design guidance.
Look up current versioned framework API documentation and compare two configuration options.
Review the working-tree diff before a PR and report reviewer findings.
Write a commit message, PR title, and PR description for one cohesive staged change.
Rename one symbol and all references without changing behavior.

Compare the viable implementation approaches for adding a local cache in this repository, inspect the current code constraints, choose the smallest safe path, and give me an execution-ready plan. Do not change code or look up external APIs.
Compare the current documented behavior and compatibility of two framework cache APIs. Use versioned external documentation; do not choose an implementation for this repository yet.
Add focused unit tests for the existing cache fallback behavior and evaluate the remaining coverage gap. Product behavior is already correct.
